name: libfftw3-double3
title: libfftw3-double3
summary: Library for computing Fast Fourier Transforms - Double precision
description:
Library for computing Fast Fourier Transforms - Double precision
The FFTW library computes Fast Fourier Transforms (FFT) in one or more
dimensions. It is extremely fast. This package contains the shared library
for double precision transforms.
.
To get the static library and the header files, you need to install
libfftw3-dev. For documentation, see libfftw3-doc.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfftw3-double3 because Library for computing Fast Fourier Transforms - Double precision.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfftw3-double3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfftw3-double3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfftw3-double3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
